item.title: Version 1.0.14
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.14 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * fix(middle-click): fix middle click simulation failure after wake from lid close by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/94 * Add device battery plugin by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/93 * Use official Homebrew cask install path by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/96 * Add menu bar hidden plugin by @ggbond268 in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/97
## New Contributors * @ggbond268 made their first contribution in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/97
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.13...v1.0.14
